description: Central, no-hardcode configuration for the PUBLIC edition of the Data Function App. Unlike the private (APIM) and network-injection editions, this app keeps public network access ENABLED and exposes an interactive Swagger UI. It shares the existing dedicated B1 Linux App Service plan 'asp-fdryvnetgw-data-eastus' (a dedicated plan can host multiple apps) with the private edition, but uses its own storage account and system-assigned managed identity. Consumed by scripts/deploy-public-function-app.ps1.

hosting_plan.comment: Reuses the EXISTING dedicated B1 Linux App Service plan in East US that already hosts the private edition (func-fdryvnetgw-data-eastus). A dedicated App Service plan supports multiple apps, unlike Flex Consumption (FC1) which is one-app-per-plan. No new plan is created.
hosting_plan.name: asp-fdryvnetgw-data-eastus

storage_account.name: stfdryvnetgwpub
storage_account.comment_identity: Azure Policy enforces allowSharedKeyAccess=false on new storage accounts in this subscription, so the Function App authenticates to its content/runtime storage with its system-assigned managed identity (AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName + AzureWebJobsStorage__credential=managedidentity). The MI is granted Storage Blob Data Owner + Storage Queue Data Contributor + Storage Table Data Contributor on the storage account. No account keys are used.
